productName: BLAZE Can - 12oz Rosin - Strawberry Lemonade 100mg THC
description: A boutique infused beverage with sweet-tart lemonade notes, a refreshing finish, and the kind of flavor that makes it feel like a treat before the effects even arrive. It features THC for a classic euphoric lift. A refreshing sativa option for customers who prefer their cannabis in a drinkable format.
